acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux CI, macOS CI, and nightly deep-checks jobs declare conservative `timeout-minutes` values.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml contains linux `timeout-minutes: 45` and macos `timeout-minutes: 30`; .github/workflows/nightly.yml contains deep-checks `timeout-minutes: 180`.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing commands and action versions remain unchanged.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The workflow diff adds only job-level timeout metadata.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Workflow syntax and repo hygiene checks pass.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: actionlint, qd report validation, full `just check`, and `git diff --check` passed; results are recorded in evidence/m4-ci-job-timeouts/commands.log.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence records workflow validation and qd reports.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Workflow validation is recorded in evidence/m4-ci-job-timeouts/commands.log; completion and audit reports are present under reports/qd/m4-ci-job-timeouts/.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The notes and reports describe GitHub Actions job metadata only.

realWorldValidation.evidence: No live hosted run is required for this CI metadata node; workflow linting, qd report validation, and repo hygiene checks validate the scoped change.
